793375104.summary: Collection of 100+ ready-to-run AI agents and RAG applications with tutorials.
793375104.rationale: Collection of AI agents and RAG apps organized as its primary subject matter, not a general catalog with incidental AI entries.

1148788086.summary: Curated agent skills and prompts for Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding agents.
1148788086.rationale: Skills designed specifically for AI agents; not applicable without AI coding agents as the primary use case.

1006414368.summary: Open-source video editor for web, desktop, and mobile with planned AI features.
1006414368.rationale: Core product is a video editor; MCP server and AI integration are planned features, not primary functionality.

896144595.summary: Multi-agent AI system simulating renowned investors to analyze stocks and generate signals.
896144595.rationale: AI agents are the primary mechanism for stock analysis and trading decision-making throughout the system.

1222917575.summary: Design skill and prompt collection for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
1222917575.rationale: Skill system built specifically for and only applicable within AI agent contexts; fundamentally dependent on AI use.

896924279.summary: Self-hosted AI companion with voice chat, game playing, and virtual character emulation.
896924279.rationale: AI is materially central to the product—a self-hosted virtual character powered by AI with interactive capabilities across web, macOS, and Windows.

1130004860.summary: Safety hook blocking destructive commands before AI coding agents execute them.
1130004860.rationale: Purpose-built safety constraint tool for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Copilot); materially AI-related through direct agent integration.

1198306812.summary: AI-powered trading agent with backtesting, portfolio optimization, and multi-agent strategy execution.
1198306812.rationale: AI and LLM capabilities are primary; designed as comprehensive trading agent system with MCP integration for autonomous execution.

1099382137.summary: Vendor-neutral specification standardizing semantic metadata exchange across analytics, AI, and BI platforms.
1099382137.rationale: Explicitly addresses AI agents as a primary stakeholder platform type; solves AI-specific reliability issues where inconsistent semantic metadata causes unreliable agent outputs.

235901813.summary: Analytics platform with AI observability and self-driving mode for autonomous product optimization.
235901813.rationale: Self-driving AI agent mode is a headline differentiator; AI observability is a core feature for LLM-powered applications; primary positioning emphasizes autonomous agent capabilities.

666299222.summary: Terminal coding agent for low-cost language models with sandboxing and tool integration.
666299222.rationale: Explicitly a coding agent designed for AI language models; core product is agent-based code execution with tool calling and multi-harness support.

1191984666.summary: Demo application for running quantized Bonsai language models locally with vision and tool support.
1191984666.rationale: Application for deploying AI language models; provides runnable reference implementation for Bonsai family of LLMs across hardware platforms with agentic tool-calling capabilities.

132750724.summary: A curated collection of step-by-step tutorials for recreating favorite technologies from scratch.
132750724.rationale: General-purpose programming tutorial collection with sections spanning 3D renderers, databases, blockchains, games, and more. AI topics (models, neural networks, visual recognition) are minority entries; the collection is organized by technology category, not by AI.

1149023093.summary: Comprehensive open textbook for AI/ML research engineers covering mathematics, computing, and AI fundamentals.
1149023093.rationale: Educational resource explicitly organized around AI/ML research with dedicated chapters on deep learning, NLP, computer vision, multimodal learning, autonomous systems, and inference. Includes MCP server for AI assistant integration.

1133883850.summary: Multi-language SDK for embedding GitHub Copilot agentic AI workflows into applications and services.
1133883850.rationale: Library providing programmatic access to Copilot's production-tested agent runtime; core functionality is AI-driven agent orchestration, planning, and tool invocation across six languages.

1230498812.summary: Workshop materials and guides for building production AI agent systems with Claude Managed Agents.
1230498812.rationale: Instructional collection focused specifically on building AI agents with Anthropic's Claude, covering multi-agent composition, memory, evals, and production deployment patterns.

1211752857.summary: Feed-forward 3D foundation model using geometric transformers for streaming scene reconstruction from video.
1211752857.rationale: A published 3D foundation model with novel Geometric Context Transformer architecture for real-time scene reconstruction. Includes pre-trained weights, research paper, and streaming inference optimization.

1129930192.summary: UI design skills and patterns collection for design engineers with CLI-based routing and selection.
1129930192.rationale: A design patterns and UI skills collection for design engineers. While it mentions routing agents, the collection itself is organized around design patterns and UI components, not AI systems.

1185590488.summary: Five-hundred-three-lesson AI curriculum spanning math foundations through autonomous systems and swarms.
1185590488.rationale: Comprehensive structured curriculum covering AI from mathematics through transformers, LLMs, agents, and multi-agent systems. Each lesson produces reusable artifacts: prompts, skills, agents, and MCP servers.

1167788341.summary: Local-first code intelligence graph and MCP server optimizing context for AI code review tools.
1167788341.rationale: Explicitly designed as an MCP server that reduces token context for AI coding assistants (Claude, Cursor, etc.) using structural code analysis and incremental graph updates, with benchmarked 38x–528x token reduction.

1191904384.summary: Multi-model AI chat interface supporting sixty-plus models with red-teaming and comparative evaluation.
1191904384.rationale: A chat interface for red teaming and cognition research supporting 60+ OpenRouter models, local models, and Venice. Includes multi-model racing, adversarial perturbation engine, and sampling parameter optimization.
